summary.notes: Inventory focuses on icon usage, tabbed interfaces, ribbon group/button usage, modals, tree nodes, and input controls. This file is intended to drive deterministic replacement with Blueprint wrappers and iconMap mappings.

elements.description: Primary top navigation tabs (Home, Migration, Integrity, View) rendered as horizontal buttons. These must be removed and replaced by single-tier ribbon group selector.
Multiple RibbonGroup blocks rendered via renderRibbonContent(); RibbonBtn currently renders large vertical icon+label buttons (violates new narrow ribbon rule).
Document tabs rendered under the ribbon (Start Page, Monitor..., Live Map, Dead Letter Queue, Schema Configuration). Must be replaced by Document Switcher (popover + MRU).
Object Explorer header with close icon; tree uses InternalTreeNode component (inline).
Various inline icons used throughout headings, list rows and controls.
Local Ribbon primitives used by App; RibbonBtn supports 'large' vertical layout and a 'small' minimal variant. Will be replaced by NarrowRibbon, RibbonGroup, RibbonDivider primitives.
apiSurface: RibbonBtn({icon, label, variant, onClick, active, color})

elements.description: Custom tree node presentation using Blueprint `Icon`. Candidate to migrate to Blueprint `Tree` or wrap locally.

Large custom modal using `lucide-react` icons (`Settings`, `Save`, `X`) and native HTML controls. Must be migrated to `@blueprintjs/core` `Dialog`/`FormGroup`/`InputGroup` wrappers and `@blueprintjs/icons`.

Multi-step wizard using lucide icons (`Server`,`Database`,`Cloud`,`Check`,`ChevronRight`,`ChevronLeft`), multiple inputs, step sidebar. Replace modal surface with `BPDialog` and buttons with `BPButton` wrappers; map icons to Blueprint icons.

Uses lucide icons (`Database`,`UploadCloud`,`Cloud`,`Server`) for system diagram; multiple buttons and mini-tabs above logs. Candidate for migration to Blueprint icon usage and replacing tab buttons with Ribbon toggles.

nextActionsSuggested: Generate canonical iconMap (src/components/blueprint/utils/iconMap.ts) from detected names
Create wrapper primitives (BPButton, BPIconButton, BPDialog, BPInput) that forward props without changing IPC/state
Replace `Ribbon.tsx` usage with `NarrowRibbon` adapter and migrate one App tab to ribbon group as a smoke test
Audit IPC channel names (in `src/main.tsx` and preload/electron) to ensure wrappers do not alter event payloads
